title: U.S. restrictions on new Anthropic models could trigger a global AI arms race
summary: The U.S. government has restricted Anthropic's new Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models, citing security concerns for foreign access, potentially prompting other nations to accelerate their AI development efforts.
content: Anthropic has blocked access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models after the government flagged them as a security threat when used by foreign nationals.

zh.title: 美国对新的Anthropic模型的限制可能引发全球人工智能军备竞赛
zh.summary: 美国政府限制了Anthropic的新型Fable 5和Mythos 5模型，理由是外国获取存在安全隐患，这可能促使其他国家加速其人工智能开发工作。

title: Trump says peace deal will be signed Sunday after Iran said it remains cautious on timing
summary: President Trump announced a peace agreement ending the Iran war will be signed on Sunday, though Iran has expressed uncertainty about the timeline.
content: President Donald Trump posted on Truth Social that a deal to end the war with Iran will be signed on Sunday.

zh.title: 特朗普表示将在周日签署和平协议，伊朗对时间表仍持谨慎态度
zh.summary: 特朗普总统宣布结束伊朗战争的和平协议将于周日签署，但伊朗对时间表表示不确定。

title: What drove the stock market last week — before and after SpaceX's historic IPO
summary: SpaceX's successful initial public offering provided a significant boost to market sentiment, reversing a week of investor anxiety.
content: The successful debut of Elon Musk's rocket company wiped away a week of anxiety.

zh.title: 上周股市走势如何——SpaceX历史性首次公开募股前后
zh.summary: SpaceX成功的首次公开募股为市场情绪提供了显著提振，扭转了投资者一周的焦虑。

title: Trump to meet with Mideast leaders, attend Ukraine session at G7, U.S. officials say
summary: President Trump is scheduled to attend the G7 summit in Evian, France on Monday, where he will meet with Middle Eastern leaders and discuss Ukraine following a White House MMA event.
content: Trump is scheduled to travel to Evian, France, for the G7 summit early Monday after attending Sunday's mixed-martial-arts event at the White House.

zh.title: 特朗普将在七国集团峰会上会见中东领导人、参加乌克兰会议，美国官员称
zh.summary: 根据美国官员的说法，特朗普总统定于周一出席在法国埃维昂举行的七国集团峰会，期间他将与中东领导人会面并讨论乌克兰问题，此前白宫发生了综合格斗赛事。

title: Why TD Securities anticipates even bigger days ahead for SpaceX
summary: TD Securities analysts view SpaceX's IPO as just the beginning, suggesting substantial growth potential lies ahead for the aerospace company.
content: Peter Haynes, TD Securities' head of index and market structure, suggests SpaceX's public debut is only a small part of the larger SpaceX timeline.

zh.title: 为什么TD证券预期SpaceX未来会有更大的发展
zh.summary: TD证券分析师认为SpaceX的首次公开募股仅仅是开始，暗示这家航空航天公司未来有巨大的增长潜力。

title: Judge orders Trump administration to restore National Park changes at sites that 'disparaged' U.S.
summary: A federal judge has ordered the Trump administration to reverse changes made to National Park sites deemed to have disparaged the U.S., with weekly compliance reports required.
content: The Trump administration must also provide a weekly status report describing the progress it's made with these changes, the judge wrote.

zh.title: 法官下令特朗普政府恢复在"诋毁"美国的国家公园遗址所做的改变
zh.summary: 一名联邦法官已下令特朗普政府撤销对被认为诋毁美国的国家公园遗址所做的改变，并要求提交周期性的合规报告。

title: This 28-year-old paid off her law school loans selling stickers and coloring books
summary: Elyse Burns paid off her law school debt by selling art and coloring books on Etsy, generating nearly $5 million in annual revenue through her creative e-commerce business.
content: Elyse Burns started selling her art on Etsy when she turned 18. Now she's paid off her student loans and did nearly $5 million last year.

zh.title: 这位28岁女性通过销售贴纸和着色书清偿法学院贷款
zh.summary: Elyse Burns通过在Etsy上销售艺术品和着色书清偿了法学院债务,通过她的创意电商业务年收入近500万美元。

title: My elderly mother and I own a home together. Will Medicaid force its sale?
summary: A reader questions whether Medicaid regulations would require the sale of a home owned jointly with an elderly parent, highlighting estate planning and asset protection concerns.
content: “My sister thinks Medicaid will take the house my mom and I own together.”

zh.title: 我和年迈的母亲共同拥有一套房子。医疗补助会强制出售吗?
zh.summary: 一位读者质疑医疗补助条例是否会要求出售与年迈父母共同拥有的房产,突出了遗产规划和资产保护的问题。

title: These stocks are the most overbought or oversold after a choppy week on Wall Street
summary: Following a volatile trading week, Adobe stock has become oversold while J.M. Smucker Company appears overbought based on earnings-driven market reactions.
content: Reaction to earnings reports led Adobe to become oversold, while J.M. Smucker Company was left overbought.

zh.title: 华尔街波动的一周后,这些股票处于最高估或最低估状态
zh.summary: 经历了一个波动的交易周后,Adobe股票变得被低估,而美国食品公司(J.M. Smucker Company)基于收益驱动的市场反应显得被高估。

title: Goldman says stocks like Nvidia have more room to run
summary: Goldman Sachs analysts identify stocks with defensive characteristics, including Nvidia, that they believe offer substantial upside potential.
content: Analysts at Goldman Sachs named several stocks that have defensive attributes that they say also offer plenty of upside.

zh.title: 高盛表示英伟达等股票仍有更大上升空间
zh.summary: 高盛分析师发现具有防御特性的股票，包括英伟达，认为这些股票具有巨大的上升潜力。

title: This wealth advisor stock should benefit as clients get rich from SpaceX IPO, says Baird
summary: Baird analysts highlight Andersen Group, a San Francisco wealth advisory firm, as an overlooked beneficiary positioned to profit as clients gain wealth from the SpaceX IPO.
content: San Francisco-based wealth advisor Andersen Group is a less-than-obvious beneficiary of the SpaceX IPO, according to Baird.

zh.title: 贝瑞德称这只财富顾问股票将从SpaceX IPO中客户财富增长中受益
zh.summary: 贝瑞德分析师强调旧金山财富咨询公司安德森集团是一个被忽视的受益方，有望从客户因SpaceX IPO获利而获得财富增长中获利。

title: SpaceX IPO sticks the landing. Here's what investors are saying about its epic first trading day
summary: SpaceX's IPO launch proceeded smoothly with strong trading volume and retail participation, though volatility remained surprisingly moderate throughout the first day.
content: Despite a large retail allocation and huge volume, volatility was moderate

zh.title: SpaceX IPO成功着陆。以下是投资者对其史诗般首个交易日的评价
zh.summary: SpaceX的IPO启动顺利进行，交易量和散户参与度强劲，尽管整个首个交易日的波动率仍然出人意料地温和。

title: New student loan plan comes with higher bills for many. Tax planning can help cut your payments
summary: The Department of Education's new student loan repayment plan may increase payments for some borrowers, though strategic tax planning can help reduce monthly bills.
content: With some planning, federal student loan borrowers can save on their monthly bills under the U.S. Department of Education's new repayment plan.

zh.title: 新的学生贷款计划会增加许多人的账单。税务规划可以帮助减少您的付款
zh.summary: 教育部新推出的学生贷款偿还计划可能会增加一些借款人的付款，尽管战略性税务规划可以帮助降低月付款额。

title: SpaceX employees now have enough wealth on paper to buy every home in this Texas city
summary: SpaceX employees have accumulated substantial paper wealth from the IPO, with their collective equity gains theoretically sufficient to purchase every home in a specific Texas city.
content: 2025 set an all-time high for first-time buyers who used financial assets to buy a home or fund a down payment, according to the National Association of Realtors.

zh.title: SpaceX员工现在拥有足够的纸面财富来购买这个德州城市的每一栋房屋
zh.summary: SpaceX员工通过IPO积累了大量纸面财富，他们的集体股权收益理论上足以购买这个特定德州城市的每一栋房屋。

title: Moats vs. moonshots: The Warren Buffett-Elon Musk style debate
summary: The contrasting investment philosophies of Warren Buffett and Elon Musk—steady competitive advantages versus high-risk innovation—continue to shape modern investor strategy debates.
content: In 2018, Warren Buffett and Elon Musk indirectly debated a key question that persists for modern investors.

zh.title: 护城河对阵登月项目：沃伦·巴菲特与埃隆·马斯克风格的辩论
zh.summary: 沃伦·巴菲特和埃隆·马斯克截然不同的投资理念——稳定竞争优势对比高风险创新——继续影响现代投资策略的辩论。

title: The rich keep spending money on ‘unapologetic luxury’ — and it’s raising prices on everyday goods for everyone
summary: Wealthy consumers continue spending on luxury goods despite inflationary pressures, which could complicate the Federal Reserve's efforts to combat inflation. Their sustained high-end consumption may keep demand elevated across the economy, potentially supporting overall price pressures on everyday goods.
content: The wealthy are unfazed by inflation, and that could complicate the Fed’s ability to fight it.

title: From 10% chance of success to $2 trillion market cap: SpaceX's historic IPO
summary: SpaceX debuted on Nasdaq on Friday and became the sixth most-valuable U.S. company by market capitalization at $2 trillion, despite having significantly lower revenue than other tech giants. The historic IPO marks a major milestone for the aerospace company, which faced only a 10% success chance in its early years.
content: After its Nasdaq debut on Friday, SpaceX was the sixth most-valuable U.S. company, despite being a fraction the size by revenue of tech's megacaps.

zh.title: 从10%的成功概率到2万亿美元市值:SpaceX的历史性IPO
zh.summary: SpaceX于周五在纳斯达克上市,市值达2万亿美元,成为美国第六大有价值公司,尽管其收入远低于其他科技巨头。这一历史性IPO对于这家在早期只有10%成功概率的航空航天公司来说,标志着一个重大里程碑。

title: Drugmakers race to find a place in the next wave of obesity drugs
summary: Pharmaceutical companies are racing to gain market share in the rapidly growing obesity drug sector, which is currently dominated by Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly. Multiple drugmakers are developing competing treatments to capitalize on surging patient demand for obesity medications.
content: Drugmakers are betting they can crack into the obesity drug market that Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly currently dominate.

zh.title: 制药商竞争在下一波肥胖症药物市场中占据一席之地
zh.summary: 制药公司正在争夺快速增长的肥胖症药物领域的市场份额,该领域目前由诺和诺德和礼来公司主导。多家制药商正在开发相互竞争的治疗方法,以利用患者对肥胖症药物需求的激增。

title: Rivian CEO taking different approach than Elon Musk for humanoid robotics company
summary: Rivian CEO RJ Scaringe launched a separate humanoid robotics company called Mind Robotics last year that has raised over $1 billion in funding. His approach to the robotics venture differs from Elon Musk's strategy in the same sector.
content: Rivian CEO RJ Scaringe started a robotics company late last year called Mind Robotics that he says has has raised more than $1 billion.

zh.title: Rivian CEO在人形机器人公司上采取与埃隆·马斯克不同的策略
zh.summary: Rivian首席执行官RJ·斯卡林奇去年创立了独立的人形机器人公司Mind Robotics，已融资超过10亿美元。他对这家机器人企业的策略与埃隆·马斯克在同一领域的方法不同。

title: Defaults in debt markets are starting again, warns Pimco. Here’s the bond giant’s game plan.
summary: Investment firm Pimco warns that defaults in debt markets are beginning to rise again and cautions investors about stretched equity valuations. The bond giant recommends increasing fixed income allocations to anchor portfolios as economic conditions shift.
content: Investors should increasingly seek out fixed income to anchor portfolios as equity valuations look stretched, says Pimco.

zh.title: Pimco警告债市违约开始重新出现，债券巨头公布应对计划
zh.summary: 投资公司Pimco警告债市违约开始重新增加，并对股票估值过高向投资者发出警告。这家债券巨头建议增加固定收益配置，以在经济形势变化时为投资组合提供支撑。

title: Beijing says it's 'strongly dissatisfied' with Pentagon move against top Chinese tech firms
summary: The Pentagon added multiple Chinese technology companies—including Alibaba, Baidu, and BYD—to a list of entities it believes have aided China's military capabilities. Beijing responded with strong objection, saying it is 'strongly dissatisfied' with the U.S. action.
content: The Pentagon added a slew of Chinese tech firms, including Alibaba, Baidu and BYD, to a list of entities it believes have aided China's military.

zh.title: 北京表示对五角大楼针对中国顶级科技企业的举措"强烈不满"
zh.summary: 五角大楼将包括阿里巴巴、百度和比亚迪在内的多家中国科技公司列入其认为协助中国军事能力的实体名单。北京对美国的这一举措做出了强烈反对，表示"强烈不满"。

title: U.S. opens its home World Cup with a dynamic 4-1 victory over Paraguay, sparked by Balogun's 2 goals
summary: The U.S. national soccer team defeated Paraguay 4-1 in their World Cup home opener with a dominant first-half performance. Forward Balogun scored twice as part of a three-goal barrage before halftime that set the tone for the victory.
content: Balogun scored twice in the Americans' three-goal barrage before halftime in a dynamic 4-1 victory over Paraguay.

zh.title: 美国在主场世界杯开幕战中4-1击败巴拉圭，巴洛贡打进两球立功
zh.summary: 美国国家足球队在世界杯主场揭幕战中以4-1击败巴拉圭，上半场表现占据主导地位。前锋巴洛贡打进两球，上半场三球猛攻的一部分，为胜利奠定了基调。

title: Trump says U.S. military strike killed leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang
summary: President Trump announced that U.S. military forces conducted a strike that killed Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores, the leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang. The operation targeted one of the region's most significant criminal organizations.
content: Trump on Friday said U.S. forces carried out a ⁠strike that killed Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores, the leader of Venezuelan ​gang Tren de Aragua.

zh.title: 特朗普称美国军事打击击毙委内瑞拉特伦德阿拉瓜帮头目
zh.summary: 特朗普总统宣布美国军事力量进行了一次打击，击毙了委内瑞拉特伦德阿拉瓜帮的领导人赫克托·鲁斯滕福德·格雷罗·弗洛雷斯。该行动针对该地区最重要的犯罪组织之一。

title: Workers begin removing Trump's name from the Kennedy Center, hours after a court-ordered deadline
summary: Workers began removing Trump's name from the Kennedy Center on Friday, hours after meeting a court-ordered deadline for the removal. Crowds gathered on the plaza to witness the process, with spectators cheering as crews dismantled the signage.
content: Dozens of people spent hours on Friday on the plaza in front of the Kennedy Center, occasionally cheering as they broke into chants of "take it down."

zh.title: 法院截止期限后数小时，工人开始从肯尼迪中心移除特朗普的名字
zh.summary: 周五，在达到法院规定的截止期限后数小时，工人开始从肯尼迪中心移除特朗普的名字。人群聚集在广场上观看这一过程，观众在工作人员拆除标志时欢呼雀跃。

title: UAE denies 'false' reports of fund transfer to Iran
summary: The UAE denied recent reports claiming it had agreed to unlock billions of dollars in frozen funds for Iran. The statement followed a Reuters report detailing the alleged fund transfer agreement between the two nations.
content: The statement follows a Reuters report that the UAE has agreed to unlock billions of dollars of frozen funds for Iran.

zh.title: 阿联酋否认向伊朗转移资金的"虚假"报道
zh.summary: 阿联酋否认了最近关于其同意为伊朗解冻数十亿美元冻结资金的报道。该声明随后发表在路透社关于两国间据称的资金转移协议的报道之后。

title: Switzerland is voting on whether to cap its population at 10 million. Here's what to know
summary: Switzerland is holding a vote on capping population at 10 million, which could restrict immigration and strain its EU free-movement agreement.
content: Switzerland votes on a population cap that could tighten immigration and put its EU free-movement agreement under pressure.

zh.title: 瑞士投票决定是否将人口限制在1000万。以下是你需要了解的内容
zh.summary: 瑞士正在进行投票决定是否将人口上限定在1000万，这可能会限制移民并对其欧盟自由流动协议造成压力。

title: Anthropic disables access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 to comply with government directive
summary: Anthropic disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models in response to a U.S. government export control directive.
content: Anthropic said it disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with an export control directive from the U.S. government.

zh.title: 为遵守政府指令，Anthropic禁用了Fable 5和Mythos 5的访问
zh.summary: 为遵守美国政府出口管制指令，Anthropic禁用了其Fable 5和Mythos 5模型的访问。
